Related Entities

  • hospital UNC LENOIR HEALTH CARE 3-star overall rating
  • snf Harmony Hall Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 3-star, 175 beds
  • snf Signature Healthcare of Kinston 2-star, 106 beds
  • snf NC State Veterans Home-Kinston 2-star, 100 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
